plans.name: $5/week starter plan
plans.tone: Start tiny, prove the habit, and let consistency do the first job.

plans.name: $10/week starter plan
plans.tone: A gentle automatic amount once bills and emergency cash are covered.

plans.name: $25/week momentum plan
plans.tone: A steady step when your cushion is growing and debt is not crowding you.

plans.name: $50/week wealth builder plan
plans.tone: A stronger habit for weeks when your cash buffer has real breathing room.

stockIdeas.name: Vanguard S&P 500 ETF
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Broad market ETF; no single-company press catalyst.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Low single-policy exposure because it tracks a broad index.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Broad U.S. market exposure can fit a beginner habit when cash is protected and the holding period is long.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Market-wide drawdowns can still happen, so this is not for emergency money.

stockIdeas.name: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Dividend and quality factor exposure; catalyst is slower income consistency.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Low single-company committee exposure because it is diversified.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Dividend-focused exposure may appeal to beginners who want slower, steadier market participation.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Dividend funds can lag fast-growth markets and dividends are never guaranteed.

stockIdeas.name: Microsoft
stockIdeas.pressNotes: AI, cloud, and enterprise software remain recurring public-market catalysts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Technology, AI, cybersecurity, and federal cloud discussions may affect large software firms.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Large, profitable technology companies may benefit from cloud and AI demand, but price matters.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Single-stock concentration can fall sharply even when the company is strong.

stockIdeas.name: NVIDIA
stockIdeas.pressNotes: AI chip demand and data center growth are major public catalysts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: AI infrastructure, export controls, semiconductor policy, and defense technology discussions can affect the stock.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: High-growth AI infrastructure leader with strong momentum, but valuation and volatility risk are elevated.
stockIdeas.riskNote: This can move sharply in both directions and should be sized carefully.

stockIdeas.name: SPDR Gold Shares
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Gold can react to inflation, dollar weakness, real rates, central-bank buying, and geopolitical stress.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Federal Reserve policy, Treasury yields, inflation data, and dollar strength can affect gold exposure.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Gold exposure can score well when macro uncertainty, inflation, or dollar pressure increases.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Gold can fall when real yields rise or risk appetite returns quickly.

stockIdeas.name: iShares Silver Trust
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Silver can move with precious metals, industrial demand, solar demand, and dollar/yield shifts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Energy, manufacturing, solar, and macro policy can affect silver demand.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Silver can move faster than gold when precious-metals momentum and industrial-demand narratives align.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Silver is more volatile than gold and can reverse sharply.

stockIdeas.name: VanEck Gold Miners ETF
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Gold miners can amplify gold moves and react to operating costs, margins, and commodity price trends.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Mining, permitting, energy costs, and commodity policy can affect miners.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Miners can outperform gold in strong precious-metals uptrends but carry company and sector risk.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Miner ETFs can drop faster than bullion when commodity momentum weakens.

stockIdeas.name: Apple
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Consumer hardware, services, AI device features, and China demand remain key public catalysts.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Antitrust, app-store policy, privacy, chips, and China trade policy can affect Apple.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Apple is a high-quality mega-cap, but short-term upside often depends on product, services, and AI catalysts.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Large market cap can limit fast upside and regulatory pressure can weigh on shares.

stockIdeas.name: Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Energy stocks react to oil prices, OPEC news, inventory data, geopolitical risk, and drilling policy.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Energy, permitting, leasing, sanctions, and strategic petroleum policy can affect the sector.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Energy can become attractive when oil momentum, inflation, and policy catalysts align.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Oil-driven reversals can be fast and macro-sensitive.

stockIdeas.name: Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Banks and financials react to rates, yield curve changes, credit risk, regulation, and earnings.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: House Financial Services and Senate Banking activity can affect financial-sector sentiment.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Financials can score higher when rates, credit, and regulatory signals improve together.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Credit stress or banking headlines can pressure the sector quickly.

stockIdeas.name: Lockheed Martin
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Defense budget, contracts, geopolitical tension, and weapons-program funding can affect shares.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Defense appropriations, Armed Services activity, and procurement policy are directly relevant.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Defense exposure can benefit from contract visibility and geopolitical demand, though growth may be slower.
stockIdeas.riskNote: Budget delays, program issues, or margin pressure can limit upside.

stockIdeas.name: MicroStrategy
stockIdeas.pressNotes: Bitcoin price action, ETF flows, crypto sentiment, and treasury strategy drive major moves.
stockIdeas.committeeNotes: Crypto regulation, SEC activity, and digital-asset legislation can affect sentiment.
stockIdeas.aiOutlook: Crypto-adjacent exposure can offer fast upside during strong Bitcoin momentum but risk is extreme.
stockIdeas.riskNote: This is highly volatile and can fall dramatically in a weak crypto tape.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Large technology exposure by a high-profile member household. Watch for timing around policy, chip demand, and market momentum.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Large-cap AI and cloud exposure. Compare against broader tech watchlist before treating this as a standalone signal.

congressTrades.entryPriceSource: Estimated market close near report date
congressTrades.watchReason: Consumer technology exposure by a member often discussed in congressional trading datasets.
